IUpdaterInfoStartUpdate Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Starts the software update.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.PlugIns
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
bool StartUpdate(
	Func<Task> canStartUpdater
)

Parameters

canStartUpdater
Type: SystemFuncTask
Function returning a task to run immediately before starting the update.

Return Value

Type: Boolean
A flag indicating whether the update was started successfully.
